content.speakerText: Econ 202 is known to be super heavy on readings and weekly papers.
content.speakerTextCn: 经济学202阅读量大，每周都有论文。
expectedAnswers: I'm already swamped with my writing class — I think I'll skip it.
I can handle it — I actually enjoy challenging courses.
Thanks for letting me know; I'll check the syllabus before deciding.
evaluationCriteria: 是否准确回应了课程负担的信息
是否使用了场景关键词（swamped, heavy, skip, handle）
表达是否自然、符合口语习惯，有逻辑性

content.speakerText: The history seminar requires a 15-page research paper and weekly discussion boards.
content.speakerTextCn: 历史研讨课要求提交一篇15页的研究论文和每周的讨论帖。
expectedAnswers: That sounds intense — I'm not sure I can manage it with my part-time job.
I'm fine with that — I like digging deep into topics.
Could you tell me how much time students usually spend on it each week?
evaluationCriteria: 是否针对课程工作量做出合理回应
是否使用了相关词汇（intense, manage, research paper, discussion boards）
语气是否自然，是否体现思考过程而非简单接受或拒绝
